changeSet.author: MohamedFouad
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE sys_role_rules ( role_id INTEGER NOT NULL, rule_id INTEGER NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT role_rules_p_key PRIMARY KEY (role_id,rule_id), CONSTRAINT fk_role_id FOREIGN KEY (role_id) REFERENCES role (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION, CONSTRAINT fk_rule_id FOREIGN KEY (rule_id) REFERENCES sys_rules (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION );
INSERT INTO sys_role_rules( role_id,rule_id) VALUES (1, 1) , (1, 2) , (1, 3) , (1, 4) , (1, 5) , (2, 1) , (2, 2) , (2, 3) , (2, 4) , (2, 5);
